name: project-agentification
description: Assess, harden, scaffold, and diagnose a repository's agent-readiness. Harness-agnostic; portable-first (AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, MCP, OpenTelemetry); ships an opinionated checklist grounded in published research and empirical studies of repository-level agent failure modes.

inspired_by.name: AGENTS.md
inspired_by.author: Agentic AI Foundation (Linux Foundation)
inspired_by.contribution: Vendor-neutral operational contract for coding agents; hierarchical discovery; root-to-leaf merge with closest-file precedence.

inspired_by.name: Agent Skills (agentskills.io)
inspired_by.author: Anthropic
inspired_by.contribution: SKILL.md format with YAML frontmatter; progressive disclosure (~100-token metadata at startup, full instructions on trigger).

inspired_by.name: Model Context Protocol
inspired_by.author: Anthropic / Linux Foundation
inspired_by.contribution: Capabilities-as-API: tools, resources, prompts with typed inputSchema; eliminates context-window inflation from tool definitions.

inspired_by.name: OWASP LLM and Agent Top 10
inspired_by.author: OWASP Foundation
inspired_by.contribution: Threat model: prompt injection, tool abuse, privilege escalation, data exfiltration as primary risks for agents.

inspired_by.name: AI Risk Management Framework (and Generative AI Profile)
inspired_by.author: NIST
inspired_by.contribution: Governance, content provenance, pre-deployment testing, incident disclosure; AI risk differs from traditional software risk in opacity, reproducibility, drift.

inspired_by.name: Don't Build Multi-Agents
inspired_by.author: Walden Yan (Cognition)
inspired_by.contribution: Single-agent linear default; share full context or expect divergent decisions; multi-agent architectures require strong handoff artifacts to survive.

inspired_by.name: Evaluating AGENTS.md: Are Repository-Level Context Files Helpful for Coding Agents?
inspired_by.author: Mündler et al. (ETH Zürich / LogicStar.ai)
inspired_by.contribution: Empirical: autogenerated context files drop task success ~3% and inflate cost >20%; developer-written files improve by only ~4%. Hand-curate, don't /init.

inspired_by.name: Effective Context Engineering for AI Agents
inspired_by.author: Anthropic
inspired_by.contribution: Token budget framing: find smallest set of high-signal tokens that maximize likelihood of desired outcome.

inspired_by.name: Harness Engineering: Leveraging Codex in an Agent-First World
inspired_by.author: Ryan Lopopolo (OpenAI)
inspired_by.contribution: Harness is the leverage point, not the model. ~1500 PRs by 3 engineers; trace-based self-verification.

inspired_by.name: GitHub Spec Kit
inspired_by.author: GitHub
inspired_by.contribution: Constitution → Specify → Plan → Tasks → Implement flow; spec-as-source-of-truth.

inspired_by.name: BMAD-METHOD
inspired_by.author: BMAD community
inspired_by.contribution: Multi-persona agent orchestration with explicit handoff artifacts (PM, Architect, Dev, QA, SM, UX, Tech Writer).

inspired_by.name: SWE-agent
inspired_by.author: Princeton NLP
inspired_by.contribution: .traj JSON trajectories; replayable execution histories for debugging, auditing, evaluation.

inspired_by.name: Aider Repo Map (Tree-sitter + PageRank)
inspired_by.author: Paul Gauthier (Aider)
inspired_by.contribution: AST-based dependency graph + PageRank centrality + binary-search token budgeting for repo navigation.

inspired_by.name: SLSA Framework
inspired_by.author: OpenSSF
inspired_by.contribution: Supply-chain provenance levels for release artifacts; build attestations.

inspired_by.name: OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions
inspired_by.author: CNCF / OpenTelemetry
inspired_by.contribution: Standard names for trace/log/metric attributes; code.filepath, code.function, code.lineno; correlation across traces, metrics, logs.

inspired_by.name: Engineering Agents — Harness Assessment
inspired_by.author: Engineering Agents
inspired_by.contribution: Level 1–5 maturity rubric (Ad hoc → Instructed → Habitat → Spec Architecture → Sovereign); 'weakest discipline is your ceiling.'
